_description: Add a pop to the control. Put {_bsPopover!i} into the control element as an attribute.

_popPosition.desc: Position to display the Tooltip when hovering over the control.

_popClose.desc: How should it be opened and closed?

_popBody.desc: Body of Popover. Not for Tooltip.

_bsPopover: {if popTitle<>'' and popPosition<>''} data-container=body data-toggle={popStyle}{if popPosition<>''} data-placement={popPosition}{/if}{if popClose <>'focus'} data-trigger={popClose}{/if} title='{popTitle!j}'{if popBody<>''} data-content='{popBody!j}'{/if}{/if}
_bsPopover2: {if popTitle<>'' and popPosition<>''} data-toggle={popStyle}{if popPosition<>''} data-placement={popPosition}{/if} data-trigger={popClose} title="{popTitle!j}"{if popBody<>''} data-content="{popBody!j}"{/if}{/if}
